title: Mistral Vibe Skill Schema
description: Schema for validating Mistral Vibe SKILL.md files

name.description: Unique identifier for the skill (slug format, e.g., 'data-cleaner').

description.description: Clear and concise description of the skill's purpose and use cases.

user-invocable.description: Whether the skill can be invoked directly by the user.

allowed-tools.description: List of tools the skill is permitted to use.

examples.name: data-cleaner
examples.description: A skill for cleaning and validating CSV files, including handling missing values and standardizing formats.
